output:
[DIAGRAM_REF_0]


This diagram shows the data flow from the Packing System to Odoo: the packing system writes a new record to the `PackingMaster` table when a carton is scanned; Odoo’s script reads these new rows, uses the `packing_data_tracking` table to determine which records are new, processes the packing data into Odoo, and then updates the tracking table with the latest processed ID.

---

diagrams.mermaidCode:
flowchart TD
    A[Packing System] -->|Scans carton| B[PackingMaster table]
    B -->|New record created| C[Odoo script (reads new rows)]
    C -->|Checks last ID read| D[packing_data_tracking table]
    D -->|If new ID > last ID| E[Process packing data]
    E -->|Create/Update Odoo records| F[Odoo database (sales order, packing info)]
    E -->|Update last ID| D
    C -->|No new records| G[Idle / wait]
